subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-22 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: You are welcome, most welcome! We have divided the friends into two groups, but the place is still too small
subcodes.first_line_orig: خوش آمدید صفا آوردید گفتم احباء را دو قسمت کنیم ولکن باز جا کم است اللهم زدهم
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @growth of the Cause, @past, present and future of Iran, @predictions and prophecies
